arts.ttl: Tottenham to offer key star significant pay rise amid interest from Euro giants
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur defender Cristian Romero has been linked with a move away from the club. The Argentine international joined Tottenham on loan in 2021 and the North London club signed him permanently in 2022 for a fee of around £40 million.
